query: SELECT w.id, w.name, w.subscriptionStatus, w.plan, w.subscriptionEndsAt, w.lastPaymentAt, w.trialEndsAt, w.suspendedAt FROM workspaces w WHERE w.name LIKE '%בדיקה%' OR w.id IN (SELECT u.workspaceId FROM users u WHERE u.email = 'anat@leandolini.com');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ScXmtJuaTeKxeck.a823cb61aea9 --database ZqvPyEVdTkw9DPvc2ezGwV --execute SELECT w.id, w.name, w.subscriptionStatus, w.plan, w.subscriptionEndsAt, w.lastPaymentAt, w.trialEndsAt, w.suspendedAt FROM workspaces w WHERE w.name LIKE '%בדיקה%' OR w.id IN (SELECT u.workspaceId FROM users u WHERE u.email = 'anat@leandolini.com');
